sections.paragraph:
Original: ירא ירה

Transliteration: yârâh yârâ'

Phonetic: yaw-raw'

BDB Definition:

  1. to throw, shoot, cast, pour
    1. (Qal)
      1. to throw, cast
      2. to cast, lay, set
      3. to shoot arrows
      4. to throw water, rain
    2. (Niphal) to be shot
    3. (Hiphil)
      1. to throw, cast
      2. to shoot
      3. to point out, show
      4. to direct, teach, instruct
      5. to throw water, rain

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 910

Part(s) of speech: Verb
